ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_code" TEXT /* Unique state code */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the state in square miles */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the state */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the state */,
  "state_fips" TEXT /* State FIPS code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_code" TEXT /* Unique county code */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Reference to the state where the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the county in square miles */,
  "county_fips" TEXT /* County FIPS code */,
  "city" TEXT /* Name of the city where the county is located */,
  "urban_rural" TEXT /* Urban or rural classification of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracts" (
  "tract_code" TEXT /* Unique tract code */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Reference to the state where the tract is located */,
  "county_code" TEXT /* Reference to the county where the tract is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the tract */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the tract in square miles */,
  "tract_fips" TEXT /* Tract FIPS code */,
  "urban_rural" TEXT /* Urban or rural classification of the tract */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the tract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tract_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_rates" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response rate entry */,
  "geo_id" TEXT /* Reference to the geographic identifier */,
  "response_rate" REAL /* Percentage of respondents who responded */,
  "hardship_level" REAL /* Level of economic hardship for respondents */,
  "response_rate_category" TEXT /* Category of response rate */,
  "hardship_level_category" TEXT /* Category of hardship level */,
  "response_rate_date" TEXT /* Date when the response rate was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator entry */,
  "geo_id" TEXT /* Reference to the geographic identifier */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate for the region */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate for the region */,
  "unemployment_rate_category" TEXT /* Category of unemployment rate */,
  "poverty_rate_category" TEXT /* Category of poverty rate */,
  "indicator_date" TEXT /* Date when the economic indicators were calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the user's account is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "geo_id" TEXT /* Reference to the geographic identifier */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the device that accessed the data */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Type of device that accessed the data (e.g., desktop, mobile, etc.) */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
